top_signals.title: SpaceX gets assist from DOJ in effort to toss NAACP air pollution lawsuit
top_signals.summary: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
